archetype: Archetype 7: Electric & Neon (Adapted for Offline Tech Utility)

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] flex flex-col justify-between p-6 overflow-hidden relative

animated_voice_orb.classes: relative w-32 h-32 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-[#713F9E] to-[#4D2B73] border-4 border-[#4D2B73]/50 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(113,63,158,0.6)] z-20 cursor-pointer
animated_voice_orb.motion: framer-motion pulse. scale: [1, 1.05, 1], shadow shifting when listening.

voice_command_status.description: Text area showing current listening status or user transcript.
voice_command_status.classes: text-center text-xl font-medium text-[#FFFFFF] min-h-[3rem] mt-6 z-20

quick_action_chips.container_classes: flex flex-wrap gap-3 justify-center mt-auto mb-6 z-20
quick_action_chips.item_classes: px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-[#241542] border border-[#4D2B73] text-[#B0A0C8] text-sm hover:bg-[#4D2B73] hover:text-[#FFFFFF] transition-colors flex items-center gap-2

command_history_area.description: Glassmorphic overlay/list for past executed actions.
command_history_area.classes: w-full bg-[#241542]/80 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl p-4 border border-[#4D2B73]/50 mt-4 overflow-y-auto max-h-[25vh] z-20

greeting_header.description: Top section with logo/brand and connection status.
greeting_header.classes: flex items-center justify-between w-full py-2 z-20
greeting_header.badge_classes: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-[#1A0E2E] border border-[#A0D7E8]/30 text-[#A0D7E8] text-xs flex items-center gap-2 font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

background_decoration.description: Abstract circuit board aesthetic mimicking the user logo theme.

motion_and_interactions.orb_listening: Infinite pulse animation with easeInOut. Scale 1 to 1.1 to 1. Duration: 1.5s.
motion_and_interactions.chip_entrance: Staggered fade-up animation from the bottom using framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.history_item: Fade in and slide left transition.

icons.rationale: Matches the techy, futuristic, and tactile feel of a hardware-centric app.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text passes AA contrast on #241542 surface backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent.file_extensions: Use .js and .jsx extensions exclusively. Do NOT use .tsx files.
instructions_to_main_agent.ui_library: Use framer-motion for the central orb animations, chip entrance staggering, and ripple effects. Build layout using pure Tailwind CSS utility classes.
instructions_to_main_agent.offline_first: Simulate local-only architecture. Hardcode suggested actions like Flashlight, Maps, Settings. Do not attempt external API logic.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_lock: Ensure the layout spans exactly 100dvh to simulate a native mobile app view. Do not let the app scroll vertically at the document level; only scroll the command history list if needed.
